name: Credit Human | Park Ten Financial Health Center
description_short: Credit Human is a credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and investment products with competitive rates and zero-fee checking accounts.
description_long:
Credit Human is a credit union that provides comprehensive financial services to its members through physical locations and digital banking channels. The institution positions itself around the concept of "financial slack"—building financial flexibility and security for members at various life stages. Based on their website presence and service offerings, Credit Human operates as a full-service financial cooperative, emphasizing member benefits and community-focused banking.

The credit union offers a complete range of deposit and lending products. On the savings side, members can open Share Savings accounts (with $5 minimum deposit), participate in Share Certificates with terms ranging from 6 months to 10 years (currently offering 3.85% APY on 12-month certificates), and access Dividend Checking accounts that earn monthly dividends. For borrowing needs, Credit Human provides home loans with zero down payment options and no mortgage insurance requirements (their "Slack Builder Home Loan"), personal loans, and Lines of Credit with flexible repayment terms. Investment services include Traditional Money Fund IRAs for retirement planning.

Credit Human differentiates itself through emphasis on member education and financial wellness. The website features financial health resources covering homeownership, tax planning, debt management, and personal finance education. They highlight fraud protection protocols and member security measures. The institution offers convenient access through multiple physical locations, ATMs, interactive teller machines, mobile deposit, and online bill pay capabilities. Their messaging focuses on eliminating bank fees and providing competitive rates as core value propositions.

As a credit union, Credit Human serves members rather than shareholders, which typically translates to lower fees and competitive rates. However, membership eligibility may apply depending on geographic location or employment, and service breadth may be more limited than large national banks. The website emphasizes security and fraud prevention, suggesting awareness of evolving financial crime threats. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Zero-fee checking account with no monthly maintenance charges
Low minimum deposit requirements ($5 for Share Savings accounts)
Competitive dividend-bearing checking and savings accounts
Home loans with zero down payment and no mortgage insurance requirements
Share Certificates with flexible terms from 6 months to 10 years
Multiple convenient access points including physical locations and interactive teller machines
Free financial advice and educational resources on homeownership, taxes, and debt management
cons: Membership eligibility requirements may apply (typical credit union restriction)
Limited geographic reach compared to national banks—service area not specified on website
Share Certificate requires $500 minimum deposit, higher than savings account requirement
Website lacks transparent information about loan rates, requiring members to inquire directly
Line of Credit described vaguely without specific APR ranges or maximum borrowing limits
best_for: Members seeking fee-free checking and savings with competitive rates
Homebuyers interested in down-payment-free mortgage options
Savers wanting flexible certificate of deposit terms without long-term commitment
Credit union members prioritizing educational resources and community-focused banking
diagnosis: Credit Human is best for credit union members seeking a full-service financial institution with low fees, competitive savings rates, and community-focused banking. The main caveat is that specific terms, rates, and membership eligibility requirements are not fully detailed on their website, requiring direct contact with the credit union for complete information on loan rates and member qualification criteria.
services: Share Savings accounts with $5 minimum deposit
Free Checking with zero monthly fees
Dividend Checking with monthly dividend earnings
Home loans with zero down payment and no mortgage insurance
Lines of Credit with flexible repayment terms
Traditional Money Fund IRAs for retirement savings
Mobile deposit and online bill pay
Financial health counseling and advisory services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
